title: AXSchedulerSlotDropEvent
description: Event data for appointment drop operations in the scheduler.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Interface representing slot drop event with drag event data, slot information, and dropped appointment.

data.content: interface AXSchedulerSlotDropEvent { dropEvent: AXDropZoneDropEvent; appointment: AXSchedulerAppointment; slot: { startDate: AXDateTime; endDate: AXDateTime; view: AXSchedulerView }; isSameSlotDrop: boolean; }

type.name: { startDate: AXDateTime; endDate: AXDateTime; view: AXSchedulerView }

props.name: isSameSlotDrop
props.description: Whether the drop is in the same slot.
